  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.rulefilter used by de.uka.ilkd.key.control
    Class
    Description
    TacletFilter
    Interface for filtering a list of TacletApps, for example to choose only taclets for interactive application or taclets belonging to some given heuristics.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.rulefilter used by de.uka.ilkd.key.core
    Class
    Description
    TacletFilter
    Interface for filtering a list of TacletApps, for example to choose only taclets for interactive application or taclets belonging to some given heuristics.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.rulefilter used by de.uka.ilkd.key.macros
    Class
    Description
    RuleFilter
    Interface for objects that represent sets of rules, and which can be used to distinguish different kinds of rules.

    Interface for objects that represent sets of rules, and which can be used to distinguish different kinds of rules.
